title: Kidambi Srikanth Falters at Last Step in US Open Final
indian_angle: Kidambi Srikanth, a prominent Indian shuttler, reached the final of the US Open, showcasing his return to form.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open ended in the final, where he lost to Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a significant upset by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a major upset by beating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.

title: BAI Warns Against Unauthorized Badminton Leagues and Tournaments
indian_angle: Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued a warning against unauthorized badminton leagues and tournaments, aiming to regulate the sport's domestic landscape.
summary: The Badminton Association of India released an advisory cautioning players and officials against participating in unauthorized badminton leagues and tournaments, emphasizing official sanctioning.

title: Asian Games Badminton Squad Reassembles, Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The Indian badminton squad for the Asian Games, including the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, has reassembled for preparations.
summary: India's badminton contingent for the upcoming Asian Games has reconvened, with the notable inclusion of the Treesa Jolly-Gayatri Gopichand women's doubles pair.

title: India Submits EOI to Host BWF World Championships 2026
indian_angle: India has expressed interest in hosting the prestigious BWF World Championships in 2026, a significant step for Indian badminton.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued an Expression of Interest to host the BWF World Championships in 2026, signaling India's ambition in global badminton.
